sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56895" key="kermi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερμίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n56895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κερμάτιον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.93</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
